description_long: This bungalow is a single-story residential building with a modern, open floor plan and a spacious attached double garage. The exterior walls are finished in a light beige color, complemented by large windows that allow ample natural light into the living spaces. The front entrance features a small covered porch with decorative planters, while the rear and side elevations reveal multiple access points and a private patio area. The roof is flat, giving the structure a contemporary appearance, and the landscaping includes red gravel beds around the perimeter. Interior spaces are divided into distinct rooms, including bedrooms, bathrooms, a kitchen, living area, and utility spaces. The garage is directly accessible from the main living area and is large enough to accommodate two vehicles and storage shelves.
description: A modern, single-story bungalow with a flat roof, large windows, attached double garage, and a small front porch with planters.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, porch with planters, and large windows facing the street.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the double garage doors, driveway, and a glimpse of the interior layout.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the garage interior, backyard access, and private patio area.
description_view_3: Opposite side view with additional windows, secondary entrances, and a clear view of the flat roof.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical with large front and side windows
